我特别爱南轻和宋辞这一对希望能有个he！
番外篇别太爱好吗，被梦里百般宠自己的南小将军在现实生活里那么冷漠，清清简直要气死了，一边说不可能喜欢这个纨绔，一边看到南浔勾肩搭背眼里都要喷火了，作者大大 番外咱大大的来！我别太爱了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717505723,"group_id":"7319315420043824190","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4353664264185997"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7319315420043824190","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"448"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2501,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":77414,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7328773480107017022","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得很好 神女落凡，让一众人恨得牙痒痒。
重生前：
闻笙见南浔常往群芳阁跑，体贴道“你若喜欢，都可纳回府中。”
随便去哪个女人那里都行，只要别来我这里。
重生后：
闻笙眼角微红地拉着南浔的衣角，虚弱道“阿浔，你不要我了吗？”
别不要我。
侥幸重来一次，南浔既还爱她这抹颜色，她便让她多看看。
最好，看入心底，渗入骨血。
这一世，别再丢下她。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6ee23c59a3e6e2ccf8d2d7a74756d3a4","author":"竾鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7319315420043824190","book_name":"长清欢","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#502828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7319315510154232382","read_count":"27241","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"742751"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"372","tags":"双女主,古代,重生,前世今生,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/40cda5e22d7ab970fa2df8d650871a48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302162&x-signature=QhJOP6NQThw%2FjrRn1x%2BRu8Te4sI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109165036562","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220236021C7CD54946E513097B55"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":61,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13066,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":32679},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_p
